ns0:entry.ns0:title: 78/xiaozhi-esp32
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/78/xiaozhi-esp32
Language: c++
An MCP-based chatbot | 一个基于MCP的聊天机器人

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
Language: c++
FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FreeCAD/FreeCAD
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FreeCAD/FreeCAD
Language: c++
Official source code of FreeCAD, a free and opensource multiplatform 3D parametric modeler.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: InoriRus/Kyty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/InoriRus/Kyty
Language: c++
PS4 & PS5 emulator

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LANDrop/LANDrop
Language: c++
Drop any files to any devices on your LAN.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LizardByte/Sunshine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LizardByte/Sunshine
Language: c++
Self-hosted game stream host for Moonlight.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ROCm/rocm-systems
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ROCm/rocm-systems
Language: c++

ns0:entry.ns0:title: UZ-SLAMLab/ORB_SLAM3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/UZ-SLAMLab/ORB_SLAM3
Language: c++
ORB-SLAM3: An Accurate Open-Source Library for Visual, Visual-Inertial and Multi-Map SLAM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WasmEdge/WasmEdge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WasmEdge/WasmEdge
Language: c++
WasmEdge is a lightweight, high-performance, and extensible WebAssembly runtime for cloud native, edge, and decentralized applications. It powers serverless apps, embedded functions, microservices, smart contracts, and IoT devices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZLMediaKit/ZLMediaKit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZLMediaKit/ZLMediaKit
Language: c++
WebRTC/RTSP/RTMP/HTTP/HLS/HTTP-FLV/WebSocket-FLV/HTTP-TS/HTTP-fMP4/WebSocket-TS/WebSocket-fMP4/GB28181/SRT/STUN/TURN server and client framework based on C++11

ns0:entry.ns0:title: amnezia-vpn/amnezia-client
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/amnezia-vpn/amnezia-client
Language: c++
Amnezia VPN Client (Desktop+Mobile)

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cactus-compute/cactus
Language: c++
Low-latency AI engine for mobile devices & wearables

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gem5/gem5
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gem5/gem5
Language: c++
The official repository for the gem5 computer-system architecture simulator.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: geode-sdk/geode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/geode-sdk/geode
Language: c++
The ultimate Geometry Dash modding framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/googletest
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/googletest
Language: c++
GoogleTest - Google Testing and Mocking Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/perfetto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/perfetto
Language: c++
Production-grade client-side tracing, profiling, and analysis for complex software systems.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hyperfield/ai-file-sorter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hyperfield/ai-file-sorter
Language: c++
Cross-platform desktop application for content-aware file organization and renaming. Supports local and remote LLMs, preview-based workflows, and fully user-controlled changes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jrouwe/JoltPhysics
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jrouwe/JoltPhysics
Language: c++
A multi core friendly rigid body physics and collision detection library. Written in C++. Suitable for games and VR applications. Used by Horizon Forbidden West and Death Stranding 2.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: optiscaler/OptiScaler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/optiscaler/OptiScaler
Language: c++
OptiScaler bridges upscaling/frame gen across GPUs. Supports DLSS2+/XeSS/FSR2+ inputs, replaces native upscalers, enables FSR-FG/XeFG on non-FG titles. Supports Nukem mod for DLSSG-to-FSR3 FG.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: protocolbuffers/protobuf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/protocolbuffers/protobuf
Language: c++
Protocol Buffers - Google's data interchange format

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
